Andre Blake.bio: Jamaica's undisputed number one and one of the best goalkeepers in MLS history with Philadelphia Union. A multiple MLS Goalkeeper of the Year winner, Blake is the Reggae Boyz's most high-profile player and defensive cornerstone.
Andre Blake.playingStyle: World-class shot-stopper with incredible reflexes, commanding aerial presence, and outstanding ability to make big saves in crucial moments
Andre Blake.worldCup2026Role: Undisputed starting goalkeeper and team leader, Jamaica's most important player
Andre Blake.notableFact: Has won MLS Goalkeeper of the Year multiple times, widely considered one of the best goalkeepers in MLS history

Greg Leigh.bio: English-born left-back of Jamaican heritage who has played in the English Championship with Oxford United. Chose to represent Jamaica at international level, adding quality and experience to the defense.
Greg Leigh.playingStyle: Athletic left-back with good overlapping ability and the stamina to contribute in both defense and attack throughout matches
Greg Leigh.worldCup2026Role: Starting left-back providing width and balance on the left side of defense
Greg Leigh.notableFact: Born in England, he qualified for Jamaica through his heritage and chose to represent the Reggae Boyz

Damion Lowe.bio: Experienced center-back with 45 caps who has played in MLS for Inter Miami alongside some of the biggest names in football. Son of former Jamaica international Onandi Lowe, continuing the family's footballing legacy.
Damion Lowe.playingStyle: Strong, physical center-back who excels in aerial duels and brings leadership and communication to the defense
Damion Lowe.worldCup2026Role: First-choice center-back and defensive leader for the Reggae Boyz
Damion Lowe.notableFact: Son of former Jamaica international Onandi Lowe, continuing a proud footballing family legacy

Ravel Morrison.bio: Supremely talented midfielder who was once considered the most gifted player to emerge from Manchester United's academy, ahead of Paul Pogba. After a nomadic career, he committed to Jamaica through his Jamaican heritage.
Ravel Morrison.playingStyle: Exceptionally technically gifted midfielder with outstanding dribbling ability, vision, and the skill to unlock any defense
Ravel Morrison.worldCup2026Role: Creative midfield option whose talent can unlock tight games against superior opposition
Ravel Morrison.notableFact: Sir Alex Ferguson called him the most talented youngster he had ever seen at Manchester United's academy

Ethan Pinnock.bio: Jamaica's most valuable player, a towering center-back who has been a rock for Brentford in the Premier League. His rise from non-league football to the top flight is one of English football's great recent stories.
Ethan Pinnock.playingStyle: Dominant, commanding center-back who excels in the air and is comfortable carrying the ball forward from defense
Ethan Pinnock.worldCup2026Role: Anchor of the defense and Jamaica's most important outfield player, a Premier League-proven center-back
Ethan Pinnock.notableFact: Rose from non-league football to become a regular Premier League starter with Brentford, one of English football's great modern journeys

Tyreek Magee.bio: Young winger playing for Philadelphia Union in MLS. A quick, exciting attacker who represents the future of Jamaican football on the right wing.
Tyreek Magee.playingStyle: Pacy, direct winger who uses his speed and skill to beat defenders and deliver crosses or cut inside to shoot
Tyreek Magee.worldCup2026Role: Wide attacking option providing pace and energy on the right flank
Tyreek Magee.notableFact: Plays alongside Jamaica teammate Andre Blake at Philadelphia Union in MLS

Leon Bailey.bio: Jamaica's star attacker and one of the Premier League's most electrifying wingers with Aston Villa. After starring at Bayer Leverkusen in the Bundesliga, his pace and trickery make him a nightmare for defenders worldwide.
Leon Bailey.playingStyle: Explosive, two-footed winger with devastating pace, incredible skill, and the ability to score spectacular goals from distance
Leon Bailey.worldCup2026Role: Star player and primary attacking threat, Jamaica's most dangerous match-winner
Leon Bailey.notableFact: Grew up in a Kingston ghetto before being adopted and moving to Europe, where he became one of the Bundesliga's best young players at Leverkusen

Oniel Fisher.bio: Veteran right-back with 45 caps who has gained diverse experience playing in Bulgaria with Ludogorets. One of the most experienced defenders in the Jamaican squad.
Oniel Fisher.playingStyle: Experienced, reliable right-back who provides defensive solidity and measured attacking contributions
Oniel Fisher.worldCup2026Role: Starting right-back bringing experience and European football know-how
Oniel Fisher.notableFact: Has played in European competition with Ludogorets, gaining experience in the Champions League and Europa League qualifying rounds

Michail Antonio.bio: Powerful striker who built his reputation in the Premier League as West Ham United's all-time leading Premier League scorer. Born in England, he chose to represent Jamaica, bringing elite-level physicality and goal-scoring ability.
Michail Antonio.playingStyle: Incredibly strong, physical striker who bulldozes defenders, excels in the air, and scores all types of goals through sheer power and determination
Michail Antonio.worldCup2026Role: Starting striker and physical focal point of Jamaica's attack
Michail Antonio.notableFact: West Ham United's all-time leading Premier League scorer who switched from England to Jamaica at international level

Jamal Lowe.bio: Versatile attacker who has played across the English football pyramid, currently with Sheffield Wednesday in the Championship. Born in London to Jamaican parents, he chose to represent the Reggae Boyz.
Jamal Lowe.playingStyle: Intelligent, hard-working forward who can play on the left wing or through the middle, combining work rate with technical ability
Jamal Lowe.worldCup2026Role: Versatile attacking option who can fill multiple positions across the forward line
Jamal Lowe.notableFact: Worked his way up from non-league football to the Championship, mirroring teammate Ethan Pinnock's remarkable rise

Bobby Decordova-Reid.bio: Skillful attacker who has played in the Premier League with Fulham and now Leicester City in the Championship. Born in Bristol to Jamaican parents, he brings quality and experience to Jamaica's attacking options.
Bobby Decordova-Reid.playingStyle: Technically gifted, versatile forward who can play across the front line, with neat link-up play and an eye for goal
Bobby Decordova-Reid.worldCup2026Role: Key attacking player providing Premier League-quality technique and versatility
Bobby Decordova-Reid.notableFact: Has Premier League experience with Fulham and brings top-flight English football pedigree to the Reggae Boyz attack

Dillon Barnes.bio: Backup goalkeeper playing for QPR in the English Championship. Born in England to Jamaican parents, he provides solid competition and depth in the goalkeeping department.
Dillon Barnes.playingStyle: Athletic, agile goalkeeper with good reflexes and a commanding presence in the box
Dillon Barnes.worldCup2026Role: Second-choice goalkeeper providing quality backup behind Andre Blake
Dillon Barnes.notableFact: Has gained Championship experience with QPR, one of London's historic football clubs

Michael Hector.bio: Experienced center-back with 30 caps who has played at the highest level of English football, including time at Chelsea. A physically imposing defender who brings leadership and aerial dominance.
Michael Hector.playingStyle: Tall, powerful center-back who dominates in the air and uses his experience to organize the defense
Michael Hector.worldCup2026Role: Experienced center-back option providing depth and leadership in the defensive rotation
Michael Hector.notableFact: Was on the books at Chelsea and has extensive experience across multiple levels of English professional football

Daniel Johnson.bio: Creative midfielder who has been a standout performer for Preston North End in the English Championship for years. Born in Kingston, Jamaica, before moving to England, bringing technical quality to the midfield.
Daniel Johnson.playingStyle: Technically skilled midfielder with an eye for goal, capable of dictating play and delivering crucial contributions in the final third
Daniel Johnson.worldCup2026Role: Key midfield creator providing goals, assists, and technical quality in the center of the park
Daniel Johnson.notableFact: Has scored over 50 goals for Preston North End from midfield, making him one of the Championship's most productive midfielders

Blair Turgott.bio: Winger playing in League One with Stevenage, born in England to Jamaican parents. Came through West Ham's academy and has chosen to represent Jamaica at international level.
Blair Turgott.playingStyle: Direct, pacy winger who takes on defenders with skill and pace, looking to deliver crosses or cut inside
Blair Turgott.worldCup2026Role: Squad depth on the wing providing an alternative attacking option
Blair Turgott.notableFact: A product of West Ham United's academy who chose Jamaica over England at international level

Kasey Palmer.bio: Former Chelsea academy product who has played across the Championship with clubs including Coventry City. A gifted playmaker whose talent was evident from a young age at Stamford Bridge.
Kasey Palmer.playingStyle: Creative attacking midfielder with quick feet, excellent dribbling, and the ability to thread incisive passes through tight defenses
Kasey Palmer.worldCup2026Role: Creative playmaker option, capable of unlocking defenses with his vision and technique
Kasey Palmer.notableFact: Came through Chelsea's elite academy alongside players like Mason Mount and Tammy Abraham

Amari'i Bell.bio: Left-back who has extensive Championship experience with Luton Town, including their historic promotion to the Premier League. Born in England to Jamaican parents.
Amari'i Bell.playingStyle: Reliable, steady left-back who combines defensive discipline with the ability to support attacks and deliver crosses
Amari'i Bell.worldCup2026Role: Backup left-back providing experienced cover on the left side of defense
Amari'i Bell.notableFact: Was part of Luton Town's remarkable journey from League Two to the Premier League

Kevon Lambert.bio: Powerful defensive midfielder playing for Hull City in the Championship. Born in Jamaica, Lambert brings physicality and ball-winning ability to the center of the park.
Kevon Lambert.playingStyle: Physical, commanding defensive midfielder who dominates the midfield battle with his size, strength, and tackling ability
Kevon Lambert.worldCup2026Role: Key defensive midfielder providing the physical presence and protection for Jamaica's back four
Kevon Lambert.notableFact: His imposing physical frame and aggressive tackling make him one of the most feared midfielders in the Championship

Di'Shon Bernard.bio: Young center-back who came through Manchester United's academy before moving to Scotland with Hibernian. A left-footed defender who brings a modern, ball-playing approach.
Di'Shon Bernard.playingStyle: Left-footed, ball-playing center-back who is comfortable building attacks from the back and stepping into midfield with the ball
Di'Shon Bernard.worldCup2026Role: Young defensive option providing a left-footed alternative at center-back
Di'Shon Bernard.notableFact: Developed at Manchester United's academy, training alongside some of the best young talents in English football

Kemar Roofe.bio: Experienced striker who has played across English football and in the Scottish Premiership with Rangers, where he scored dramatic European goals. A proven goalscorer at multiple levels.
Kemar Roofe.playingStyle: Sharp, intelligent striker with excellent finishing ability and clever movement to find space in the penalty area
Kemar Roofe.worldCup2026Role: Experienced striking option providing a proven goal threat from the bench or in rotation
Kemar Roofe.notableFact: Scored a stunning long-range goal from the halfway line for Rangers in a Europa League match, one of the competition's most memorable goals

Alex Marshall.bio: Young goalkeeper playing in MLS for New York City FC. Represents the next generation of Jamaican goalkeepers developing behind the legendary Andre Blake.
Alex Marshall.playingStyle: Young, athletic goalkeeper with good reflexes and the potential to develop into Jamaica's future number one
Alex Marshall.worldCup2026Role: Third-choice goalkeeper gaining experience and developing for the future
Alex Marshall.notableFact: Playing in MLS with New York City FC provides high-level development experience for the young goalkeeper

Richard King.bio: Young right-back from Jamaica's domestic league playing for Waterhouse FC. One of the few domestically-based players in the squad, representing local Jamaican football talent.
Richard King.playingStyle: Energetic young full-back who uses his pace and enthusiasm to compete on both sides of the ball
Richard King.worldCup2026Role: Young domestic defender providing cover at right-back and gaining World Cup experience
Richard King.notableFact: One of the few players in the squad based in Jamaica's domestic Premier League, representing the local footballing pipeline

Demarai Gray.bio: Former Leicester City winger who won the Premier League title in 2016 and has since played for Everton in the top flight. A quick, skillful attacker who chose Jamaica through his heritage.
Demarai Gray.playingStyle: Explosive, skillful winger with rapid acceleration, close control, and the ability to beat defenders in one-on-one situations
Demarai Gray.worldCup2026Role: Key attacking option on the left wing, providing pace and Premier League-quality skill
Demarai Gray.notableFact: Won the Premier League title with Leicester City in their miraculous 2015-16 season

Shamar Nicholson.bio: Prolific Jamaican striker with 8 goals in 20 caps who has played in Belgium and now Russia with Spartak Moscow. A natural goalscorer who has been consistently productive wherever he has played.
Shamar Nicholson.playingStyle: Strong, clinical striker who combines aerial ability with sharp finishing and intelligent runs in behind defenses
Shamar Nicholson.worldCup2026Role: Important striking option providing a consistent goal threat in rotation or from the bench
Shamar Nicholson.notableFact: Has maintained an impressive international goals-to-games ratio, scoring 8 goals in just 20 caps for Jamaica

Lamar Walker.bio: Young midfielder from Jamaica's domestic league playing for Harbour View. One of the youngest and least experienced players in the squad, representing the future of Jamaican football.
Lamar Walker.playingStyle: Energetic young midfielder with good ball skills and the desire to prove himself at the highest level
Lamar Walker.worldCup2026Role: Young domestic talent gaining invaluable World Cup experience for future campaigns
Lamar Walker.notableFact: Selected from Jamaica's domestic league as one of the promising young talents identified for national team development

Cory Burke.bio: Tall, powerful striker who has been a reliable performer in MLS for Philadelphia Union. Born in Jamaica, Burke brings aerial presence and physical power to the forward line.
Cory Burke.playingStyle: Target man who uses his height and strength to win aerial duels, hold up the ball, and bring teammates into play
Cory Burke.worldCup2026Role: Physical striking option providing a different dimension with his aerial ability
Cory Burke.notableFact: Has been part of Philadelphia Union's MLS success alongside Jamaica teammate Andre Blake
